title: Using Monday AI generated formula that looks correct, but field is blank
excerpt: I am trying to get a program duration by entering in the program start time and program end time and calculating the duration. Monday.com AI in formulas gave the following which looks correct: HOURS_DIFF({Program End Tim…

posts.author: Ispacestem (Sue)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to get a program duration by entering in the program start time and program end time and calculating the duration. Monday.com AI in formulas gave the following which looks correct: HOURS_DIFF({Program End Time}, {Program Time}), but the column remains empty.
